title: cirsium eriophorum subsp. odontolepis
intro: Cirsium eriophorum subsp. odontolepis, also known as the cotton thistle or woolly thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, due to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. Herbal preparations of Cirsium eriophorum subsp. odontolepis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
